title: Stance & Step 1.21.5 Edition
description: a version of Stance & Step Modpack for 1.21.5 because some mods don't work for 1.21.5
body:
## Stance & Step
A lightweight Fabric-based modpack designed for Minecraft 1.21.4 that elevates your game's look and feel without altering the core gameplay. It enhances your experience through high-quality resource packs, shaders, and subtle visual mods — all while staying true to the vanilla aesthetic.

## Why does this Version/Edition of Stance & Step even exists???
Stance & Step is only for 1.21.4 and some mods in there are only for 1.21.4 so they wouldn't work/work properly if you start it in 1.21.5. so there is this new version called " Stance & Step 1.21.5 Edition " and you may think why is there not just a new version in the original stance & step? because the 1.21.4 version would have mods the 1.21.5 version doesn't have which would make no sense (for me) so this edition is like almost exactly the same as the original, just the fact that it is for 1.21.5, different mods ( not many ) and different resource packs ( not many too ) 

## 💠 Features:
Smooth Animations
Improved player and mob animations using resource packs and client-side mods that bring more life to your world without overdoing it.

## Refined UI
Modern, minimalistic user interface packs that clean up menus, tooltips, and inventory screens for a more pleasant experience.

## Shader Support
Optional support for shaders with preconfigured, performance-friendly presets that add dynamic lighting, shadows, and better water — without losing the Minecraft charm. ( BSL & ComplementaryReimagined )

## Faithful Visual Packs
Resource packs that stay close to Minecraft’s original look while subtly enhancing textures, colors, and clarity.

## 🎮 Gameplay-Friendly:
This pack does not add new items, blocks, mobs, or mechanics. It’s all about visuals — perfect for builders, explorers, and survival players who want Minecraft to look its best while keeping the vanilla spirit untouched.

## Settings ( Important )
1. Make sure in the Hold my Items Mod, mb-3d compability is _Off _
2. Put the 3D bucket ( integrated resource pack from Hold my items), is on top of every resource pack.
3. Make sure the resource packs are in the right order. ( Put all the resource packs that change the models of the mobs and stuff ON TOP of Fresh Animations.
4. It is highly recommended to also use the PhysicsModPro Because the drop physics and Ocean physics are really nice!

[Physics Mod Pro Download 1.21.5](https://www.patreon.com/file?h=125045392&m=442139858)
